video_summary: This is an instructional/promotional video for the Lapstar FLS training system. It provides an overview of the training facility, equipment setup, and demonstrations of all five FLS MISTELS tasks including Peg Transfer (Task 1), Pattern Cut (Task 2), Endoloop (Task 3), Extracorporeal Suture (Task 4), and Intracorporeal Suture (Task 5). The video shows the Lapstar trainer stations, multiple trainees in a training facility, close-up laparoscopic views of each task, and the monitoring/feedback interface. This is NOT a single performance to be scored.

demonstrated_techniques: Pattern cutting with precise directional control
Suture placement with marked entry/exit points
Knot tying and manipulation with knot pusher

score_recommendation: NOT APPLICABLE - This is an instructional video demonstrating the FLS training system and equipment, not a performance to be scored. Individual task performances cannot be evaluated from this overview format.
confidence_rationale: High confidence in classification as instructional content. Video clearly shows product demonstration, multiple stations, and overview of all tasks without individual timed performance. However, cannot assess individual task execution or scoring since this is not a single trainee performance video.
